summary: A proposed repair route in a relationship domain (apologize and give expensive gift) has structural leakage — unilateral repair labor pattern. System invalidates it and proposes a mutuality-based alternative.
claim_attempt: The proposed apology-plus-gift route is structurally leaking due to unilateral repair labor; system invalidates it and routes toward mutuality restoration instead.
stress_point: relationship leakage pattern must be caught, not routed through
